location: Random drop (roughly 10%) from Guardian Golem enemies; the earliest reliable farm is the trio of golems (two halberd-wielders plus an archer) on the bridge to the Divine Tower of Limgrave, reachable from the Limgrave Tower Bridge Site of Grace.
tactics: Guardian Golems also appear in Weeping Peninsula, Stormhill, Caelid, Liurnia, Capital Outskirts, Leyndell, and the Mountaintops of the Giants, but the Limgrave bridge trio respawns right next to a grace, making it the go-to farm
Fighting three golems at once this early is dangerous — bait the Archer Golem's shots into its melee companions, or pull them one at a time if you can
Target the golems' legs; it staggers them faster than attacking the body
lore: A great halberd of black stone, made by a civilization long since lost to ruin, now wielded by the towering Guardian Golems that watch over roads and bridges across the Lands Between.

builds.name: Strength/Dex mobility build
builds.why: It comes pre-equipped with the Charge Forth skill, normally exclusive to halberds, giving a colossal weapon unusual gap-closing mobility for a quality build.
